# SitRep Templates

SitRep templates control the structure of transaction status reports. They let you decide which sections are included when you generate or schedule a SitRep for a transaction.

## Creating a SitRep template

1. Go to **Templates > SitRep Templates**
2. Click **New Template**
3. Choose the report category
4. Select the sections to include
5. Save the template

DocJacket also includes system templates you can duplicate when you want a starter layout.

## Using a SitRep template

Open a transaction and go to the **Reports** section. From there, choose a SitRep template, preview the report, adjust sections if needed, then send or download the report.

## Common sections

SitRep reports can include property details, participants, key dates, task status, document status, financial summary, and notes depending on the template and transaction data.
